fix: use standard PORT env var and add graceful shutdown (#13)

Render sets PORT automatically but we were reading WEBHOOK_PORT, causing
the service to bind to the wrong port. Rename to PORT everywhere. Also
add graceful shutdown handling so webhooks arriving during deploys get a
503 (GitHub retries) instead of a silent 200 with no worker to process
the task.

fix(tts): return wav format hint to match fish-speech output

returning "mp3" as the format hint. HA forces ffmpeg to decode with
-f mp3, which fails on WAV bytes (Header missing / Invalid data).

commit.message:
security(csp): replace unsafe-inline/eval with nonce-based CSP via middleware

Static CSP with 'unsafe-inline' + 'unsafe-eval' in script-src was
effectively security theater — any injected script could execute. Now
middleware generates a per-request cryptographic nonce; only scripts
carrying the token run. Also adds COOP same-origin, X-DNS-Prefetch-Control,
object-src/worker-src none, upgrade-insecure-requests, disables legacy
X-XSS-Protection (weaponizable in older browsers), and replaces deprecated
interest-cohort with browsing-topics in Permissions-Policy.

20 tests pass, build clean, lint clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Replace CPU heuristic with JSONL turn-state detection

Active/idle detection now reads the tail of each session's JSONL
transcript to determine turn state deterministically:

- "working": a human text message exists after the last turn-ending
  system entry (turn_duration or stop_hook_summary)
- "idle": the last turn-ending system entry is newer than the last
  human message, OR Claude's text response is >30s old with no
  turn_duration (handles crash/Ctrl-C cases)
- "unknown": falls back to CPU threshold (3%) when JSONL unavailable

This eliminates the false spikes where 16 idle sessions would briefly
register as "active" due to GC/keepalive CPU blips crossing the old
0.5% threshold.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add configurable request timeout support via HasTimeout trait (#9)

Adds Saloon's HasTimeout trait to the Waha connector with configurable
values from config/env. Defaults to 10s connect and 60s request timeout,
which prevents cURL timeout errors on media operations (sendImage,
sendVideo, etc.) where WAHA downloads files server-side.

Closes #8

* research: prove Descartes parity result (0 sorries) and fix Schauder sorry

Descartes Rule of Signs (OQ-01):
- Prove sv_parity_sign_eq (Stage A): combinatorial parity via eraseLead induction
- Prove no_pos_roots_sign_eq (Stage B): IVT-based root sign agreement
- Prove signVariations_X_mul_eq: X multiplication preserves sign variations
- Prove descartes_parity_proved: full parity theorem via X-adic factorization
- Eliminate all 5 sorries in Part IX (was: 3 sorry + 2 sorry in factorization)
- The axiom descartes_parity is now provable (needs file restructuring to replace)

Schauder Fixed Point:
- Prove closedness of convex hull using Set.finite_range.isClosed_convexHull
- Reduces Schauder file from 1 sorry to 0 sorries

Previous approaches all hit merge conflicts from stale state.
New approach: save backup files to /tmp, do a clean checkout of
latest main, copy files back, commit and push. No merge needed.

Fix: rename doGet() in safetyTipSubmissions to remove conflict

Both safetyTipSubmissions.gs and facebookSubmitter.gs defined doGet()
in the same GAS project. Since 's' sorts after 'f', the safety tips
doGet() always won, blocking the Facebook Submitter HTML form from
ever loading. Renamed to safetyTipsHealthCheck() — all real safety
tip traffic uses doPost(), so nothing breaks.

commit.message:
fix: use naive datetime for OTP expires_at, raise IngressRoute priority

- Replace datetime.now(timezone.utc) with datetime.utcnow() to match
  the naive DateTime DB column type (asyncpg rejects aware datetimes
  in TIMESTAMP WITHOUT TIME ZONE columns)
- Raise IngressRoute priority from 10 to 100 so the API /api path
  wins over the frontend catch-all (Traefik auto-priority for the
  frontend Host-only rule was ~37, beating our explicit 10)

commit.message:
feat: Add GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline for Docker and Helm releases

Add automated workflows:
- operator-build.yml: Build and push multi-arch operator images to Docker Hub
  - Triggers on operator code changes (api/, internal/, cmd/, config/)
  - Auto-increments version and updates manifests
  - Creates git tags (operator-v*)
  - Builds for linux/amd64 and linux/arm64

- dashboard-build.yml: Build and push multi-arch dashboard images to Docker Hub
  - Triggers on dashboard code changes (dashboard/, api/)
  - Auto-increments version independently
  - Creates git tags (dashboard-v*)
  - Builds for linux/amd64 and linux/arm64

- helm-release.yml: Package and publish Helm charts to GitHub Pages
  - Triggers on Helm chart changes or after operator builds
  - Lints, packages, and publishes to gh-pages branch
  - Creates GitHub releases with chart packages
  - Updates Helm repository index

Improvements:
- Fix dashboard Dockerfile for multi-arch support (add ARG TARGETOS, TARGETARCH)
- Update README with GitHub Pages Helm repository installation instructions
- Smart change detection to skip unnecessary builds
- Auto-versioning with patch increment
- Docker Hub integration using DOCKER_USERNAME and DOCKER_PASSWORD secrets

Usage:
1. Add Docker Hub credentials as GitHub secrets:
   - DOCKER_USERNAME
   - DOCKER_PASSWORD
2. Enable GitHub Pages on gh-pages branch
3. Push changes to trigger workflows automatically

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

commit.message:
Шарабельные ссылки через ?_s=sid + фикс 404 SPA-роутинга

Заменяем Location.prototype.pathname (не работал) на replaceState с ?_s=sid:
- SPA видит /orders/ в pathname → роутер находит маршрут, 404 исчезает
- URL показывает /orders/?_s=sid → можно скопировать и передать
- Catch-all: /orders/?_s=sid → редиректит на /p/sid/orders/ → работает в инкогнито
- pushState/replaceState перехватываются и добавляют ?_s=sid автоматически

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: Firebase SDK 12.x対応 — Phone Auth URLスキーム追加 + 全Firebaseパッケージメジャーアップグレード

Firebase Auth SDK 12.xがreCAPTCHAコールバック用に新URLスキーム
(app-{GOOGLE_APP_ID})を要求するようになり、Phone認証で
Fatal errorクラッシュが発生していた。Info.plistに
app-1-319960355608-ios-2711963242d7cf778c846dスキームを追加。
併せてUIBackgroundModes: remote-notificationも追加。

Firebase全パッケージをメジャーバージョンアップグレード:
- firebase_core 3→4, firebase_auth 5→6
- cloud_firestore 5→6, firebase_storage 12→13
- firebase_messaging 15→16, firebase_crashlytics 4→5
- firebase_app_check 0.3→0.4, firebase_analytics 11→12
- firebase_performance 0.10→0.11, cloud_functions 5→6

fix(timetable): pass childId to WeekView in ChildTimetable for drag-and-drop

drag-and-drop operations onto empty cells to silently fail. The
handleDragEnd handler requires childId to create new sessions when
dropping on empty time slots.
